controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (access criteria for payment systems) directions 2017
controls.control_description: 1.1.1 These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Access Criteria for Payment Systems) directions 2017.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (access criteria for payment systems) directions 2017

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india (rbi)
controls.control_description: 1.1.2 These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india (rbi)

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all scheduled/ licensed banks operating in india and authorised payment system providers (psps) who are desirous of participation in payment
controls.control_description: 1.2 Applicability The provisions of these directions shall apply to all scheduled/ licensed banks operating in India and authorised payment system providers (PSPs) who are desirous of participation in payment systems in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all scheduled/ licensed banks operating in india and authorised payment system providers (psps) who are desirous of participation in payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by rbi from time to time
controls.control_description: The centralised payment systems will include Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) System and National Electronic Fund Transfer (NEFT) system and any other system as may be decided by RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure empower their indian subsidiary / associate to enter into valid agreements with rbi
controls.control_description:
Entities not
fulfilling this requirement shall empower their Indian subsidiary / associate to enter into valid agreements with RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to empower their indian subsidiary / associate to enter into valid agreements with rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed on the recommendation of the concerned regulatory / supervisory department in case of any deterioration in the financials of the bank / pri
controls.control_description: 2.2.4 Continuation of banks / primary dealers / authorised non-bank PSPs in payment systems may be allowed on the recommendation of the concerned regulatory / supervisory department in case of any deterioration in the financials of the bank / primary dealer / authorised non-bank PSPs below the thresholds indicated in para 2.2.1 and 2.2.2 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed on the recommendation of the concerned regulatory / supervisory department in case of any deterioration in the financials of the bank / pri

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the chief general manager, department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), reserve bank of india central office, 14th floor, cent
controls.control_description:
3.1.1 All applications for membership to centralised payment systems should be submitted to the Chief General Manager, Department of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), Reserve Bank of India Central Office, 14th floor, Central Office
building, Shahid Bhagat Singh Marg, Fort, Mumbai-400 001.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the chief general manager, department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), reserve bank of india central office, 14th floor, cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in the format prescribed in appendix - 1 "covering letter for membership to centralised payment system", together with annexures
controls.control_description: 3.1.2 The application should be in the format prescribed in Appendix - 1 "Covering letter for membership to Centralised Payment System", together with annexures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in the format prescribed in appendix - 1 "covering letter for membership to centralised payment system", together with annexures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for availing idl facility from reserve bank
controls.control_description: Non-bank PSPs shall not be eligible for availing IDL facility from Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for availing idl facility from reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the respective president of the clearing house where the entity desires to participate
controls.control_description: 3.2.1 All applications for membership to decentralised payment systems should be submitted to the respective President of the clearing house where the entity desires to participate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the respective president of the clearing house where the entity desires to participate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted in the format prescribed in appendix - 2 "covering letter for membership to decentralised payment system", together with annexures
controls.control_description: 3.2.2 The application should be submitted in the format prescribed in Appendix - 2 "Covering letter for membership to Decentralised Payment System", together with annexures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted in the format prescribed in appendix - 2 "covering letter for membership to decentralised payment system", together with annexures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the entity fulfilling the requirements as laid down in the uniform regulations and rules for bankers' clearing house (urrbch), procedura
controls.control_description:
3.2.3 The admission of an entity to a clearing house shall be subject to the entity fulfilling the requirements as laid down in the Uniform Regulations and Rules for Bankers' Clearing House (URRBCH), procedural guidelines and instructions issued in this regard, from time to time, which are placed on RBI website at following links -
https://rbi.org.in/Scripts/OccasionalPublications.aspx?head=Uniform Regulations and Rules for Bankers Clearing Houses
https://rbi.org.in/Scripts/OccasionalPublications.aspx?head=Procedural%20Guideline %20for%20Cheque%20Truncation%20System
https://rbi.org.in/scripts/FS_Notification.aspx?fn=9

3.2.4 President of the clearing house (not managed by the RBI) will seek the formal clearance of the Regional Office (RO) of the RBI before granting membership.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the entity fulfilling the requirements as laid down in the uniform regulations and rules for bankers' clearing house (urrbch), procedura

controls.control_objective: To ensure admit the member bank to the clearing house
controls.control_description: The clearing house, based on the communication received from RBI, RO (DPSS/National Clearing Cell) and after considering other requirements as applicable to the payment system, shall admit the member bank to the clearing house.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to admit the member bank to the clearing house

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a risk management framework and a system of continuous monitoring of the risk management practices of sub- member/s that they desire to s
controls.control_description: (b) The sponsor bank should put in place a risk management framework and a system of continuous monitoring of the risk management practices of sub- member/s that they desire to sponsor.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a risk management framework and a system of continuous monitoring of the risk management practices of sub- member/s that they desire to s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the board of the sponsor bank
controls.control_description: The risk management framework should be approved by the Board of the sponsor bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the board of the sponsor bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their sub-member/s adhere to and abide by the rules, regulations, operational requirements, instructions, orders, decisions, etc
controls.control_description: (e) The sponsor bank at all times should ensure that their sub-member/s adhere to and abide by the rules, regulations, operational requirements, instructions, orders, decisions, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their sub-member/s adhere to and abide by the rules, regulations, operational requirements, instructions, orders, decisions, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the sub-member/s have put in place a transparent and robust mechanism to resolve customer complaints in a quick and efficient manner, as l
controls.control_description:
To aid in this process, the sponsor bank should ensure that the sub-member/s have put in place a transparent and robust mechanism to resolve customer complaints in a quick and efficient manner, as laid down in the
procedural guidelines, business rules and regulations of the centralised payment systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the sub-member/s have put in place a transparent and robust mechanism to resolve customer complaints in a quick and efficient manner, as l

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept out of the centralised payment systems till such time they are brought under core banking
controls.control_description: (h) In order to ensure compliance with the timely credit and return disciplines which are of utmost importance in centralised payment systems, branches of sub- member/s that are not under core banking system shall be kept out of the centralised payment systems till such time they are brought under core banking.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept out of the centralised payment systems till such time they are brought under core banking

controls.control_objective: To ensure bring to the immediate notice of the rbi: • any involvement of its sub-member/s in any suspicious transactions, frauds, etc
controls.control_description:
(i) The sponsor bank should bring to the immediate notice of the RBI:
• any involvement of its sub-member/s in any suspicious transactions, frauds, etc.;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bring to the immediate notice of the rbi: • any involvement of its sub-member/s in any suspicious transactions, frauds, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately inform the regional director, mumbai regional office, reserve bank of india, the details of the sub- member/s
controls.control_description: However, as and when a bank sponsors sub-member/s or cease to act as sponsor bank of sub-member/s, it should immediately inform the Regional Director, Mumbai Regional Office, Reserve Bank of India, the details of the sub- member/s, IFSC/MICR codes allotted to the branch/branches of sub-member/s, date of commencement/ discontinuation of sub-membership etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately inform the regional director, mumbai regional office, reserve bank of india, the details of the sub- member/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include limits on presentations by such entities in the clearing house
controls.control_description: 5.3 Where concerns have been expressed on the financial conditions of an entity, in such cases, RBI could initiate measures which may also include limits on presentations by such entities in the clearing house.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include limits on presentations by such entities in the clearing house

controls.control_description:

9.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be: 9

Purpose of seeking membership (details may be given in a separate Annex for each payment system):
12.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given in a separate annex for each payment system): 12

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided b
controls.control_description: If yes, details of the Current Account may be provided b.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided b

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate so
controls.control_description: For entities for which the financial indicators are not available and/or applicable, they may indicate so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate so

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted as conclusive and binding for all purposes unless any discrepancy is pointed out within seven days from the date of access of account by t
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank's own record of transactions maintained through computer systems or otherwise shall be accepted as conclusive and binding for all purposes unless any discrepancy is pointed out within seven days from the date of access of account by the user/account holder through the computer system or from the date of sending the statement to the account holder, whichever is earlier

Yours faithfully,

Chairman/ Chief Executive/ Managing Director
* Original documents are required for scrutiny & registration process only and will be returned after completion of verification process and retaining a copy of the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted as conclusive and binding for all purposes unless any discrepancy is pointed out within seven days from the date of access of account by t

controls.control_objective: To ensure kindly be credited to the account to be opened in our name
controls.control_description:
Annex-II: SGL, IDL-SGL application formats
Application form for opening Subsidiary General Ledger Account (PDO 136)
<On the letter head of the institution>
Address:
Date:
The Regional Director Reserve Bank of India Public Debt Office

Mumbai 400 001

Dear Sir,

Subsidiary General Ledger Account

We enclose a Bond of Indemnity duly executed by us in terms of the instructions contained in your Memorandum of procedure for the opening of Subsidiary General Ledger Accounts and request that the under mentioned securities held by us in our name may kindly be credited to the Account to be opened in our name.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to kindly be credited to the account to be opened in our name

controls.control_objective: To ensure kindly be credited to this account
controls.control_description: We request that the interest and maturity payment of securities held by us in our name may kindly be credited to this account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to kindly be credited to this account

controls.control_objective: To ensure where the context so requires include its successors or assigns) of the one part and the reserve bank of india constituted under the reserve bank of india act ii of 1934 hereinafter called the 'obligee' (which expression shall where the context so requires include its successors or assigns ) of the other part : whereas the reserve bank of india has been constituted under reserve bank of india act, ii of 1934 and whereas at the request of the obligor and for its convenience the obligee has agreed to allow the obligor to lodge government securities held by it and standing in its name with the obligee with powers of conversion into stock in ledger form as also reconversion and whereas the obligee has agreed to open a ledger account in the books of any of its public debt offices in india in respect of government of india and state government securities of different states so to be lodged by the obligor from time to time with the obligee and whereas the obligee relying on the representations made by the depositor that it is rightfully entitled to the said securities has agreed to accept the securities that will from time to time be lodged with the obligee without any admission as to the title thereto or the propriety or validity of the endorsements thereon
controls.control_description:
and elsewhere in India hereinafter called the "Obligor" (which expression shall where the context so requires include its successors or assigns) of the One Part and THE RESERVE BANK OF INDIA constituted under the Reserve Bank of India Act II of 1934 hereinafter called the 'Obligee' (which expression shall where the context so requires include its successors or assigns ) of the Other Part :
WHEREAS the Reserve Bank of India has been constituted under Reserve Bank of India Act, II of 1934 AND WHEREAS at the request of the Obligor and for its convenience the Obligee has agreed to allow the Obligor to lodge Government securities held by it and standing in its name with the Obligee with powers of conversion into Stock in Ledger Form as also reconversion and WHEREAS the Obligee has agreed to open a Ledger Account in the books of any of its Public Debt Offices in India in respect of Government of India and
State Government securities of different States so to be lodged by the Obligor from time to time with the Obligee and WHEREAS the Obligee relying on the representations made by the depositor that it is rightfully entitled to the said securities has agreed to accept the securities that will from time to time be lodged with the Obligee without any admission as to the title thereto or the propriety or validity of the endorsements thereon, provided the Obligor executes a Deed as is herein contained in favour of the Obligee agreeing to indemnify fully and effectually the President of India and Governors / State Governments of the States whose securities will from time to time be lodged by the Obligor with the Obligee and/or the said Obligee against any claim, demand, action, proceedings, costs, charges and expenses whatsoever in respect of the securities AND WHEREAS the Obligor has agreed to execute a Deed of Indemnity being these Presents NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSETH that pursuant to the said Agreement and in consideration of the premises, the Obligor doth hereby covenant with the Obligee that the Obligor shall and will from time to time and at all times hereafter well and effectually save, defend , keep harmless and indemnified the President of India and Governors / Governments of the concerned States and/or the
Obligee, their estate and effects of / from and against all claims, actions, demands, proceedings, costs, charges and expenses whatsoever in respect of the Government Securities which may from time to time be lodged by the Obligor with the Obligee and converted into Stock and held to its credit in the said Ledger Account and pay or make good to any person to whom the Obligee may assign this bond in pursuance of the provisions of Sub-Section (2) of Section 15 of the Government Securities Act 2006, or otherwise, which assignment may be in respect of all or any of the securities referred to above, the amount payable on any such security or securities covered by the assignment, including any amount of interest thereon received by the Obligor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to where the context so requires include its successors or assigns) of the one part and the reserve bank of india constituted under the reserve bank of india act ii of 1934 hereinafter called the 'obligee' (which expression shall where the context so requires include its successors or assigns ) of the other part : whereas the reserve bank of india has been constituted under reserve bank of india act, ii of 1934 and whereas at the request of the obligor and for its convenience the obligee has agreed to allow the obligor to lodge government securities held by it and standing in its name with the obligee with powers of conversion into stock in ledger form as also reconversion and whereas the obligee has agreed to open a ledger account in the books of any of its public debt offices in india in respect of government of india and state government securities of different states so to be lodged by the obligor from time to time with the obligee and whereas the obligee relying on the representations made by the depositor that it is rightfully entitled to the said securities has agreed to accept the securities that will from time to time be lodged with the obligee without any admission as to the title thereto or the propriety or validity of the endorsements thereon

controls.control_description: Any other requirement as per the reciprocal arrangement with the country may also be complied.

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by all rules, regulations, principles, terms and conditions that rbi may stipulate in respect of nds-om and that all such rules, regulations, pr
controls.control_description: We shall abide by all rules, regulations, principles, terms and conditions that RBI may stipulate in respect of NDS-OM and that all such rules, regulations, principles, terms and conditions, as amended and applicable from time to time shall be binding on us;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to abide by all rules, regulations, principles, terms and conditions that rbi may stipulate in respect of nds-om and that all such rules, regulations, pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate our nds-om member number and concerned nds-om user number allocated to us at the time of grant of access to nds-om in all our communicatio
controls.control_description: (h) we shall incorporate our NDS-OM Member Number and concerned NDS-OM User Number allocated to us at the time of grant of access to NDS-OM in all our communications to RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate our nds-om member number and concerned nds-om user number allocated to us at the time of grant of access to nds-om in all our communicatio

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way be liable for any loss or damage or consequences that may arise on account of unauthorised and/or wrongful use of our nds-om member number
controls.control_description: (i) RBI and/or any of its officials shall not in any way be liable for any loss or damage or consequences that may arise on account of unauthorised and/or wrongful use of our NDS-OM Member Number and/or NDS-OM User Number;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way be liable for any loss or damage or consequences that may arise on account of unauthorised and/or wrongful use of our nds-om member number

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any right, title or interest with respect to nds-om, its facilities, software and/or information provided by rbi
controls.control_description: (j) we or any of our officials shall not have any right, title or interest with respect to NDS-OM, its facilities, software and/or information provided by RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have any right, title or interest with respect to nds-om, its facilities, software and/or information provided by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable for all trades executed on nds-om for orders entered into nds-om on our own behalf or on behalf of our constituents
controls.control_description: (k) we are aware that we can place orders/ report trades (as applicable)on NDS-OM on our own behalf as well as on behalf of our constituents and that we shall be liable for all trades executed on NDS-OM for orders entered into NDS-OM on our own behalf or on behalf of our constituents;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable for all trades executed on nds-om for orders entered into nds-om on our own behalf or on behalf of our constituents

controls.control_description: (n) we shall not permit any of our officials or any other person(s)/entity/ies to -

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with rbi and any unauthorised use of the same shall render it to be treated as act of infringement and dealt with accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the absolute discretion to part with/disclose or disseminate such information concerning the members quotes/trades settled or rejected and either
controls.control_description: (p) The Member agrees that the Bank shall have the absolute discretion to part with/disclose or disseminate such information concerning the members quotes/trades settled or rejected and either cleared and settled directly in Public Debt Office (PDO) of the Bank or through the Clearing Corporation of India relating to government securities and all other instruments traded or reported on NDS-OM as deemed necessary by the Bank to regulatory authorities, government, other agencies and press and media.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to have the absolute discretion to part with/disclose or disseminate such information concerning the members quotes/trades settled or rejected and either

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held responsible or liable for any failure of computer system, telecommunication network and other equipment installed at the member's office premi
controls.control_description: (q) The Bank shall not be held responsible or liable for any failure of computer system, telecommunication network and other equipment installed at the Member's office premises.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held responsible or liable for any failure of computer system, telecommunication network and other equipment installed at the member's office premi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have right to inspect and supervise all computer systems, systems software, telecommunication equipments running nds-om application software at the me
controls.control_description: The Bank shall have right to inspect and supervise all computer systems, systems software, telecommunication equipments running NDS-OM application software at the members' end.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have right to inspect and supervise all computer systems, systems software, telecommunication equipments running nds-om application software at the me

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding upon the member
controls.control_description: The decision of the Bank in this behalf shall be final and binding upon the Member.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding upon the member

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable for suspension/ termination as per the regulations
controls.control_description: (s) The Member agrees that in case it undergoes any corporate reorganization including any amalgamation, demerger or acquisition of any undertaking, its membership shall be liable for suspension/ termination as per the Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable for suspension/ termination as per the regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a right to call for such information, data and documents as may be deemed necessary and the member shall provide the same to the bank and also ex
controls.control_description: (t) In the event of any corporate change in the management of the Member, the Bank shall have a right to call for such information, data and documents as may be deemed necessary and the member shall provide the same to the Bank and also extend all necessary cooperation in this behalf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a right to call for such information, data and documents as may be deemed necessary and the member shall provide the same to the bank and also ex

controls.control_objective: To ensure be binding on the member
controls.control_description: (v) The Member unconditionally and irrevocably agrees that any transaction made by it by electronic SGL transfer form through RBI CBS (E-Kuber) shall be binding on the member.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be binding on the member

controls.control_objective: To ensure act on such electronic forms and put through the transactions without any risk and responsibility
controls.control_description: The Member will not repudiate the transaction/s subsequently for any reason whatsoever and the Bank may act on such electronic forms and put through the transactions without any risk and responsibility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act on such electronic forms and put through the transactions without any risk and responsibility

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep indemnified the bank against any loss/damage suffered by the bank while availing of the facilities through nds-om by the member and any loss, dam
controls.control_description: (x) Without prejudice to the other rights and remedies available to the Bank, the Member hereby agrees to indemnify and shall keep indemnified the Bank against any loss/damage suffered by the Bank while availing of the facilities through NDS-OM by the Member and any loss, damage, cost, expenses arising due to any default, misconduct or negligence on the part of the Member or any employee, agent, servant or representative of the Member.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep indemnified the bank against any loss/damage suffered by the bank while availing of the facilities through nds-om by the member and any loss, dam

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest solely on the member
controls.control_description: entering into a transaction settled by the Bank in electronic book entry form shall rest solely on the Member.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest solely on the member

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final
controls.control_description:
(z) In the event of any differences/dispute arising between the Member and the Bank
/any other member as to the interpretation, meanings or effect of this undertaking or as to the rights and liabilities of the member/s or the Bank or as to any other matter, the Bank's decision in this behalf shall be final.

controls.control_description: as may be issued by the Reserve Bank of India in this behalf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued by the reserve bank of india in this behalf

controls.control_objective: To ensure execute and sign such deeds, documents, agreements, bonds and/or undertakings as required by the bank from time to time in terms of the regulations
controls.control_description:
ii) The Member shall execute and sign such deeds, documents, agreements, bonds
and/or Undertakings as required by the Bank from time to time in terms of the Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to execute and sign such deeds, documents, agreements, bonds and/or undertakings as required by the bank from time to time in terms of the regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow and comply with such orders or instructions, be they are in the nature of penalty or otherwise as may be issued by the bank or the standing com
controls.control_description:
iii) The Member shall follow and comply with such orders or instructions, be they are in
the nature of penalty or otherwise as may be issued by the Bank or the Standing Committee set up under the RTGS System Regulations, 2013 or any Institution duly constituted and authorised by the Bank for the purpose, in the event of the Member committing any violation of the Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow and comply with such orders or instructions, be they are in the nature of penalty or otherwise as may be issued by the bank or the standing com

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the absolute discretion to part with or disclose or disseminate such information concerning the member's transactions settled or rejected through
controls.control_description:
iv) The Member agrees that the Bank shall have the absolute discretion to part with or
disclose or disseminate such information concerning the Member's transactions settled or rejected through the RTGS System as deemed necessary by the Bank to Regulatory Authorities, Government and other appropriate authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to have the absolute discretion to part with or disclose or disseminate such information concerning the member's transactions settled or rejected through

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held responsible or liable for any failure or malfunctioning of the computer system, including software, telecommunication network and other equipm
controls.control_description:
v) The Bank shall not be held responsible or liable for any failure or malfunctioning of the
computer system, including software, telecommunication network and other equipments, installed at the Member's office premises.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be held responsible or liable for any failure or malfunctioning of the computer system, including software, telecommunication network and other equipm

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the right at all times to inspect and supervise all computer systems including software, telecommunication network and other equipments which pro
controls.control_description: The Bank shall have the right at all times to inspect and supervise all computer systems including software, telecommunication network and other equipments which provides access to RTGS system, both at the Primary Site and the Disaster Recovery Site.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have the right at all times to inspect and supervise all computer systems including software, telecommunication network and other equipments which pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for the loss
controls.control_description:
vi) The Bank shall not be responsible for the loss, if any, that may be caused to the
Member or its customers or any person, arising out of any action taken in good faith by the Bank's staff or the malfunctioning or breakdown of the Bank's computer systems, computer network, telecommunication network or any other equipment (inclusive of hardware and software) used in the RTGS system or any force majeure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for the loss

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at liberty to review the member's continuance as a member of the rtgs system if, in the opinion of the bank, any event or likely occurrence of an e
controls.control_description:
vii) The Bank shall be at liberty to review the Member's continuance as a member of the
RTGS System if, in the opinion of the Bank, any event or likely occurrence of an event has affected or is likely to affect directly or indirectly, the interests of the Bank or any of the policies of the Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at liberty to review the member's continuance as a member of the rtgs system if, in the opinion of the bank, any event or likely occurrence of an e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable for suspension or termination as per the regulations
controls.control_description:
viii) The Member agrees that in the event of occurrence of any of the circumstances
specified in RTGS System Regulations, 2013, its membership may be liable for suspension or termination as per the Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable for suspension or termination as per the regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a right to call for such information, data, documents etc
controls.control_description:
ix) In the event of any change in the management of the Member, the Bank shall have a
right to call for such information, data, documents etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a right to call for such information, data, documents etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be approved by the standing committee or the bank
controls.control_description:
x) The Member agrees to use digital certificates provided by the Institute for Development
and Research in Banking Technology, Hyderabad, the Certifying Authority or any other Certifying Authority as may be approved by the Standing Committee or the Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be approved by the standing committee or the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the transactions submitted are genuine, valid and are eligible under the rtgs according to the regulations
controls.control_description:
xi) The Member shall ensure that the transactions submitted are genuine, valid and are
eligible under the RTGS according to the Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the transactions submitted are genuine, valid and are eligible under the rtgs according to the regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure indemnify and keep indemnified the bank against all claims, actions, proceedings, charges, damages, demands, costs, losses and expenses by whatsoever
controls.control_description:
xii) The Member shall indemnify and keep indemnified the Bank against all claims,
actions, proceedings, charges, damages, demands, costs, losses and expenses by whatsoever name it is called, which may be brought against the Bank or its employees or which the Bank or its employees may have to incur, pay or suffer on account of use of the messages / transactions received electronically from the member for settlement, including those due to erroneous or unintended message flow or due to any IT or network related malware, malfunction or such actions of the Member, irrespective of the messaging channel used viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indemnify and keep indemnified the bank against all claims, actions, proceedings, charges, damages, demands, costs, losses and expenses by whatsoever

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final
controls.control_description:
xv) In the event of any differences or disputes arising between the Member and the Bank
or any other member of the RTGS System as to the interpretation, meaning or effect in consequence of this undertaking or as to the rights and responsibilities / liabilities of the member(s) or the Bank or as to any other matter, the Bank's decision shall be final.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final

controls.control_objective: To ensure also submit an application as prescribed in the annexure-i of uniform regulations and rules for bankers' clearing house to the president of the clearing house (urrbch)
controls.control_description:
Yours faithfully
Signature:
Name:
Designation:
Company Seal:
Date:
Place:
Encls:
3 The bank shall also submit an application as prescribed in the Annexure-I of Uniform Regulations and Rules for Bankers' Clearing House to the President of the Clearing House (URRBCH), where the bank is seeking membership

4 Current Account with RBI will be required only for participating in centres where the settlement bank is RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also submit an application as prescribed in the annexure-i of uniform regulations and rules for bankers' clearing house to the president of the clearing house (urrbch)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided b
controls.control_description:
If yes, details of the Current Account may be provided
b.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted as conclusive and binding for all purposes unless any discrepancy is pointed out within seven days from the date of access of account by t
controls.control_description: The Reserve Bank's own record of transactions maintained through computer systems or otherwise shall be accepted as conclusive and binding for all purposes unless any discrepancy is pointed out within seven days from the date of access of account by the user/account holder through the computer system or from the date of sending the statement to the account holder, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted as conclusive and binding for all purposes unless any discrepancy is pointed out within seven days from the date of access of account by t
